title: Close #65 and debug heartbeat dedup fix

log.context: Close #65 and debug heartbeat dedup fix

Done. Here's the summary:

---

**Root cause: two bugs in `is_duplicate_finding`**

Bug 1 — Dynamic count in search term. The finding string contains the current failure count (e.g. `"has failed 2x in last 24h"`). The dedup took the first 60 chars verbatim as the search term, so when the count changed to `4x` on the next heartbeat cycle the query no longer matched the existing `2x` issue. GitHub does exact token matching, not fuzzy matching.
